title: Cobblemon cafe
description: Adds new outfits to some Pokémon based on those seen in Café remix!
body:
Adds some outfits from pokemon Cafe Remix and pokemon Unite!


You can right-click your pokemon with wool to change their form!

All outfits use white wool!
Some of the Eeveelutions use Jukeboxes!




[Item guide](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1G0V9F28VvNr35u2ZNF3m-ci_9mDc9NlE_PCxABLw-IU/edit?usp=sharing)

<details>
<summary>Wool list for older versions:</summary>

Blue wool:
Gardevoir
Floragato

Red wool:
Fuecoco


White wool:
Braixen
Fennekin
Delphox
Meowscarada



Yellow wool: 
Raichu
Trapinch


Pink wool:
Dracozolt
Lilligant
Mew
Tinkaton


Purple wool:
Cuitfly
Litten
Noibat


Lime wool:
Chansey
Salamence
Serperior
Sprigatito

Orange wool:
Vibrava




Brown wool:
Arbok
Arctozolt
Chandelure
Chikorita
Cyndaquil
Goodra
Mew
Quilava
Rowlet
Tropius






</details>



**All base models belong to cobblemon!**

**Make sure to place the pack in the datapack folder of your world as well as your resource packs folder!**


You may use this pack on servers as long as they are free and not locked behind a paywall. (crates,online store etc)
